description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden barrel mounted horizontally on a sturdy wooden stand. The barrel is reinforced with four prominent metal hoops, each secured with visible rivets, giving it a classic, robust appearance. The wood grain is clearly visible, with a slightly weathered texture, suggesting it has been used or stored outdoors. One end of the barrel features a small metal spigot, indicating it is designed to dispense liquid contents. The opposite end is plain, with the circular wooden end cap visible. The overall construction and materials suggest it is suitable for storing or dispensing beverages or other liquids in an urban or rustic setting.
description: A wooden barrel with metal hoops, mounted on a wooden stand and featuring a metal spigot for dispensing liquids.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, all four metal hoops, and the wooden stand.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular end of the barrel and the metal spigot at the bottom center.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, but the spigot is less visible and the wood grain is prominent.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain circular end of the barrel and the supporting stand.
